Output.TidyFormat TYPE: bool VERSION: 1.1.1 DEFAULT: false --DESCRIPTION-- <p> Determines whether or not to run Tidy on the final output for pretty formatting reasons, such as indentation and wrap. </p> <p> This can greatly improve readability for editors who are hand-editing the HTML, but is by no means necessary as HTML Purifier has already fixed all major errors the HTML may have had. Tidy is a non-default extension, and this directive will silently fail if Tidy is not available. </p> <p> If you are looking to make the overall look of your page's source better, I recommend running Tidy on the entire page rather than just user-content (after all, the indentation relative to the containing blocks will be incorrect). </p> --ALIASES-- Core.TidyFormat --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
